author: Thrishala Miriyagalla
text:
We had such a great experience yesterday at Ideals Lanka while purchasing the iPhone 17 Pro Max. A special thank you to Inshaf and the entire team for the outstanding service provided.

From the moment we walked in, the team was welcoming, attentive, and extremely helpful. Inshaf went above and beyond to guide us through the process, patiently answering all our questions and making sure we were comfortable with our choice. The whole experience was smooth, professional, and truly enjoyable.

It’s rare to come across such genuine customer care these days, and we truly appreciate the effort and dedication shown by the team. Thank you once again for making our purchase so memorable. Highly recommended, and we’ll definitely be back!

author: Nethmi Kavithra
text: I bought my iPad (A16 )& Apple Pencil last month It helps me a lot in my work. The staff was very supportive when we bought it and Amahar was very helpful in choosing the tab that best suited our needs.

author: Maheli Minoda
text: I recently bought a Mac from Idealz after getting a quick response from their team. It was in the middle of a very busy day, and I was in a hurry after having some bad experiences with a few other places. I was honestly exhausted by all the runaround. Furkhan was extremely helpful; they quickly checked the availability, told me exactly which branch to visit, and when I got there, the laptop was ready for purchase just as promised. I really appreciated the honesty and efficiency; it made the whole process so much easier.

author: Devaka Prabash
text:
I had a great experience buying a iPhone 17 pro max at Marino mall branch. I contacted the staff Mr. Ismail and he gave me a good promotion with discount. Very good service.
Thank you idealz !👏👏👏 …

author: kavindu silva
text: Great experience. Good services from Furkhan ✌️
